columns.extraction_plan: The number of participants in the SOC-alone arm is reported as 502. This can be found in Table 1, titled "Baseline characteristics", on page 5, under the column "SOC-alone n = 502". It is also visible in Figure 1, the CONSORT diagram, on page 5, as "Allocated to SOC N = 502". The number of participants in the SOC + AAP arm is reported as 501. This can be found in Table 1, titled "Baseline characteristics", on page 5, under the column "SOC + AAP n = 501". It is also visible in Figure 1, the CONSORT diagram, on page 5, as "Allocated to SOC+AAP N = 501".
